across.clue: To ___ something means to make it weaker or worse.
When something is ___, it is not false or a copy of the original.
considering someone or something as so important that you are always thinking about them in a way that seems extreme to other people
If something happens ___, it happens before a certain time.
If something is ___, it is not controlled by something else.
To ___ is to make something exactly how someone else did it.
___ land is able to produce good crops and plants.
A ___ is a dark surface used for writing with chalk.
To ___ means to change direction or to distract.
___ is the possibility that someone or something will be harmed, destroyed, or killed.

down.clue: ___ is the act of going into a place.
To ___ means to mix or associate with others.
If something is ___ another thing, then it is next to it.
If someone is ___ they have been told they must leave their job because they are no longer needed.
If something is done ___, then it is done in advance.
To hold something firmly without shaking or moving it.

to frighten or hurt someone who is smaller or weaker than you.
